top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.asciiName
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
JOIN sets s ON c.setCode = s.code
WHERE fd.language = 'Japanese'
  AND c.isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND s.isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND s.isForeignOnly = 0;

SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.asciiName
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
JOIN sets s ON c.setCode = s.code
WHERE fd.language = 'Japanese'
  AND s.isForeignOnly = 0
  AND s.isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND c.isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND c.availability LIKE '%paper%';

SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.asciiName
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
JOIN sets s ON c.setCode = s.code
WHERE fd.language = 'Japanese'
  AND c.isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND s.isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND s.isForeignOnly = 0;

SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.asciiName
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE fd.language = 'Japanese'
  AND c.availability LIKE '%paper%'
  AND c.availability NOT LIKE '%digital%'
  AND c.availability NOT LIKE '%mtgo%';

  AND s.isForeignOnly = 0

  AND c.availability LIKE '%paper%';

  AND c.availability LIKE '%paper%'
  AND c.availability NOT LIKE '%digital%'

SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.asciiName

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.asciiName
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
JOIN sets s ON c.setCode = s.code
WHERE fd.language = 'Japanese'
  AND c.isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND s.isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND s.isForeignOnly = 0;
